title: Shadows of the Fallen

roadmap.name: Phase 1: Project Setup
tasks: Set up Unity project with necessary assets and plugins
Configure version control system (Git)
Create initial project structure and folder organization

roadmap.name: Phase 2: Pre-production Planning
tasks: Develop detailed game design document (GDD) including mechanics, UI/UX, and storyboards
Create concept art and preliminary 3D models for key characters and environments
Establish art style and visual guidelines for consistent look and feel

roadmap.name: Phase 3: Asset Creation
tasks: Model and texture main characters using Blender
Design and create environment assets such as buildings and terrain
Produce sound effects and music tracks
Develop UI elements and HUD designs

roadmap.name: Phase 4: Core Gameplay Development
tasks: Implement real-time combat mechanics
Develop turn-based strategy mechanics for resource management and planning
Integrate crafting system for weapon creation and upgrades
Program healing and health management features
Build resource management system for gathering and allocating supplies

roadmap.name: Phase 5: Polishing and Testing
tasks: Optimize performance and fix bugs
Conduct playtesting sessions to gather feedback
Refine gameplay balance based on tester feedback
Address QA consistency issues identified in the report

roadmap.name: Phase 6: Deployment and Release
tasks: Prepare final builds for target platforms (PC)
Submit game to relevant app stores and digital distribution platforms
Launch marketing campaign and social media promotion

flow_map: Asset creation using Blender and Photoshop
Gameplay programming using Unity and C#
Integration of assets and gameplay mechanics

critical_tasks: Implement core combat and strategy mechanics
Develop resource management and crafting systems
Create and integrate player character models and animations
Design and implement user interface and HUD elements
Optimize performance and fix critical bugs
optional_tasks: Add additional enemy types and AI behaviors
Include more advanced particle effects and lighting
Enhance audio with ambient sounds and dynamic music
future_expansion: Develop mobile and console versions of the game
Create additional levels and missions
Add cooperative and competitive multiplayer modes
Release downloadable content (DLC) with new characters and storylines
Implement virtual reality (VR) support

# Shadows of the Fallen — Production Plan

Generated by DreamXV Atlas AI Planner.

This archive contains the complete production layout, development roadmap, workflow maps, and source directories.
generated_files.Roadmap.md:
# Development Roadmap

## Phase 1: Project Setup
- [ ] Set up Unity project with necessary assets and plugins
- [ ] Configure version control system (Git)
- [ ] Create initial project structure and folder organization

## Phase 2: Pre-production Planning
- [ ] Develop detailed game design document (GDD) including mechanics, UI/UX, and storyboards
- [ ] Create concept art and preliminary 3D models for key characters and environments
- [ ] Establish art style and visual guidelines for consistent look and feel

## Phase 3: Asset Creation
- [ ] Model and texture main characters using Blender
- [ ] Design and create environment assets such as buildings and terrain
- [ ] Produce sound effects and music tracks
- [ ] Develop UI elements and HUD designs

## Phase 4: Core Gameplay Development
- [ ] Implement real-time combat mechanics
- [ ] Develop turn-based strategy mechanics for resource management and planning
- [ ] Integrate crafting system for weapon creation and upgrades
- [ ] Program healing and health management features
- [ ] Build resource management system for gathering and allocating supplies

## Phase 5: Polishing and Testing
- [ ] Optimize performance and fix bugs
- [ ] Conduct playtesting sessions to gather feedback
- [ ] Refine gameplay balance based on tester feedback
- [ ] Address QA consistency issues identified in the report

## Phase 6: Deployment and Release
- [ ] Prepare final builds for target platforms (PC)
- [ ] Submit game to relevant app stores and digital distribution platforms
- [ ] Launch marketing campaign and social media promotion
generated_files.FlowMap.md:
# Production Workflow & Dependencies

## Step-by-Step Workflow
1. Pre-production planning and design
2. Asset creation using Blender and Photoshop
3. Gameplay programming using Unity and C#
4. Integration of assets and gameplay mechanics
5. Polishing and optimization
6. Testing and debugging
7. Final build preparation and deployment

## Core Dependency Graph
- CombatSystem -> WeaponCrafting -> Resources -> Inventory -> PlayerCharacter
- StrategySystem -> ResourceManagement -> PlayerCharacter -> Inventory -> UI
- HealingSystem -> MedicalSupplies -> PlayerCharacter -> UI -> HUD
- Environment -> Terrain -> Lighting -> PostProcessing -> Camera
generated_files.Tasks.md:
# Project Tasks

## Critical Path Tasks (MVP)
- [ ] Implement core combat and strategy mechanics
- [ ] Develop resource management and crafting systems
- [ ] Create and integrate player character models and animations
- [ ] Design and implement user interface and HUD elements
- [ ] Optimize performance and fix critical bugs

## Optional Tasks
- [ ] Add additional enemy types and AI behaviors
- [ ] Include more advanced particle effects and lighting
- [ ] Enhance audio with ambient sounds and dynamic music
- [ ] Expand multiplayer functionality
- [ ] Incorporate more detailed character backstories

## Future Expansion
- [ ] Develop mobile and console versions of the game
- [ ] Create additional levels and missions
- [ ] Add cooperative and competitive multiplayer modes
- [ ] Release downloadable content (DLC) with new characters and storylines
- [ ] Implement virtual reality (VR) support

tasks: Define project scope and goals
Create detailed documentation and design documents

roadmap.name: Phase 2: Asset Creation and Environment Modeling

Create textures and materials for assets

roadmap.name: Phase 4: Core Gameplay Mechanics Development
tasks: Implement resource management system
Develop crafting mechanics and item database
Program combat AI and player controls
Integrate day-night cycle and environmental effects

roadmap.name: Phase 5: Multiplayer Functionality
tasks: Setup networking architecture for multiplayer
Implement co-op gameplay mechanics

roadmap.name: Phase 6: Final Testing and Quality Assurance
tasks: Conduct thorough playtesting sessions
Fix bugs and balance gameplay
Ensure cross-platform compatibility
Prepare for release

Deploy frontend to static hosting (e.g., Netlify, Vercel)
Configure domain and SSL certificate if needed

generated_files.FlowMap.md:
# Production Workflow & Dependencies

## Step-by-Step Workflow
1. Set up project structure and initialize git repository
2. Design and set up database schema using Supabase
3. Develop FastAPI endpoints for resource management
4. Design UI/UX mockups for key screens
5. Build React components for main game interface
6. Implement scavenging mechanics and resource management
7. Develop basic shooting mechanics and enemy AI
8. Conduct unit tests for backend services
9. Perform integration tests for frontend/backend communication
10. Debug and fix identified issues
11. Deploy backend to cloud service (e.g., Heroku, AWS)
12. Deploy frontend to static hosting (e.g., Netlify, Vercel)

## Core Dependency Graph
- AuthService -> Database -> API -> Frontend
- ResourceService -> Database -> API -> Frontend
- UserService -> Database -> API -> Frontend
generated_files.Tasks.md:

- [ ] Set up project structure and initialize git repository
- [ ] Design and set up database schema using Supabase
- [ ] Develop FastAPI endpoints for resource management
- [ ] Build React components for main game interface
- [ ] Implement scavenging mechanics and resource management
- [ ] Conduct unit tests for backend services
- [ ] Deploy backend to cloud service (e.g., Heroku, AWS)
- [ ] Deploy frontend to static hosting (e.g., Netlify, Vercel)

## Optional Tasks
- [ ] Enhance UI/UX with animations and transitions
- [ ] Add more detailed enemy AI and combat mechanics
- [ ] Implement additional resource types and crafting system

## Future Expansion

- [ ] Add multiplayer functionality
- [ ] Incorporate storyline and character progression

# Production Workflow & Dependencies

## Step-by-Step Workflow
1. Set up project infrastructure and tools
2. Create and refine visual assets in Blender
3. Import and integrate assets into Unity
4. Develop core gameplay mechanics and systems
5. Implement NPC interactions and alliance-building
6. Test and debug game functionality
7. Optimize performance and prepare for deployment

## Core Dependency Graph
- ResourceManager -> InventorySystem -> PlayerController
- CombatAI -> ZombieBehavior -> EnvironmentInteractions
- CraftingSystem -> ItemDatabase -> PlayerInventory
- SafeZoneDefense -> TrapSystem -> FortificationBuilder
- AllianceBuilding -> NPCDialogue -> MoraleSystem
- MoraleSystem -> PlayerMotivation -> GameProgression

# Production Workflow & Dependencies

## Step-by-Step Workflow
1. Define project scope and goals.
2. Set up version control system and project structure.
3. Create asset folders and initial project files in Unity.
4. Design and model key environments using Blender.
5. Develop character models and animations.
6. Create UI elements and HUD designs.
7. Generate textures and shaders for assets.
8. Implement resource management system.
9. Develop crafting and base building mechanics.
10. Integrate turn-based combat system.
11. Program character development and leveling system.
12. Integrate AI systems for NPCs and enemies.
13. Connect asset pipelines to the game engine.
14. Test and refine gameplay mechanics.
15. Optimize performance and ensure compatibility across platforms.
16. Conduct thorough testing for bugs and glitches.
17. Perform user acceptance testing.
18. Gather feedback and make necessary adjustments.
19. Prepare final builds for release.
20. Submit to respective app stores and distribution channels.
21. Launch marketing campaign and prepare for launch day.

## Core Dependency Graph
- ResourceManagementSystem -> CraftingMechanics -> BaseBuildingMechanics -> TurnBasedCombatSystem -> CharacterDevelopment -> AI -> Assets -> EngineIntegration -> PerformanceOptimization -> Testing -> FeedbackAdjustments -> FinalBuild -> Submission -> Marketing

# Production Workflow & Dependencies

## Step-by-Step Workflow
1. Setup project and initial configurations
2. Character design and modeling
3. Environment asset creation
4. Core gameplay mechanics development
5. AI system integration
6. User interface and experience design
7. Testing and quality assurance
8. Deployment preparation

## Core Dependency Graph
- ResourceManager -> InventorySystem -> PlayerController
- CraftingSystem -> MaterialDatabase -> ItemDatabase
- BaseBuildingSystem -> ConstructionQueue -> BuildingTemplates
- StealthCombatSystem -> EnemyDetection -> PlayerVisibility
- SquadManagement -> RoleAssignment -> SkillTrees
- CombatPlanning -> Pathfinding -> TrapPlacement
- BehaviorTrees -> EnemyAI -> CombatMechanics
- UIManager -> HUD -> InputHandling
- AlphaTesting -> BugFixing -> BetaTesting
